books.title: Intermezzo
books.author: Sally Rooney
books.description: Two grieving brothers navigate love and loss in Rooney's most structurally ambitious novel yet.

books.title: James
books.author: Percival Everett
books.description: Huck Finn retold from Jim's perspective — a Pulitzer Prize winner that reframes an American classic.

books.title: Orbital
books.author: Samantha Harvey
books.description: Six astronauts orbit Earth sixteen times in a single day — a Booker Prize-winning meditation on beauty and fragility.

books.title: The Women
books.author: Kristin Hannah
books.description: A young nurse follows her brother to Vietnam and finds the war — and its homecoming — nothing like she expected.

books.title: Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow
books.author: Gabrielle Zevin
books.description: A decades-long creative partnership between two game designers — one of the most beloved novels of recent years.

books.title: Demon Copperhead
books.author: Barbara Kingsolver
books.description: David Copperfield reborn in Appalachia, navigating foster care and the opioid crisis — a Pulitzer Prize winner.

books.title: Fourth Wing
books.author: Rebecca Yarros
books.description: A war college where riders bond with dragons — the fantasy romance that took over every bestseller list.

books.title: Long Island Compromise
books.author: Taffy Brodesser-Akner
books.description: Three decades after a kidnapping, a wealthy Long Island family is still paying the ransom in ways they can't name.

books.title: The Covenant of Water
books.author: Abraham Verghese
books.description: Three generations of a South Indian family, bound by water and a mysterious condition — epic, luminous storytelling.

books.title: All Fours
books.author: Miranda July
books.description: A woman drives away from her life and stops forty miles from home — July's wildest and most essential novel.

books.title: Holly
books.author: Stephen King
books.description: Holly Gibney hunts a pair of killers hiding in plain sight — King at his most contemporary and unsettling.

books.title: Erasure
books.author: Percival Everett
books.description: A Black novelist publishes a satirical ghetto thriller as a joke — and it becomes a bestseller. The film American Fiction is based on this.
